System.​Windows.​Window
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​WPF.​ToastNotification

Interaction logic for ToastNotification.xaml.  The ToastNotification window shows in the lower right hand corner of the screen as a toast notificaiton message to the user. This does not use the native Windows/other notification APIs.

Variables
_goUpTimer
private Timer _goUpTimer
_goDownTimer
private Timer _goDownTimer
_pauseTimer
private Timer _pauseTimer
_startPosX
private double _startPosX
_startPosY
private double _startPosY
_hasInitiatedShutdown
private bool _hasInitiatedShutdown
_workAreaHeight
private double _workAreaHeight
_workAreaWidth
private double _workAreaWidth
Functions
ToastNotification
public ToastNotification()

Construct the toast notification window. It is not shown to the user until the  method is called.

object 
sender,
RoutedEventArgs 
e
)

ClickAction
public Action? ClickAction {
get;
set
}

The action to take when the user clicks on the toast notification window
